title: New Sort by control added to Notifications - GitHub Changelog
excerpt: A new “Sort by” control appears on the Notifications page, with two options: Newest to oldest (which matches the previous behavior) and Oldest to newest. The selected sort order applies…
body_excerpt: New Sort by control added to Notifications - GitHub Changelog Skip to content Skip to sidebar / Blog Changelog Docs Customer stories Try GitHub Copilot See what's new Search Changelog Docs Customer stories See what's new Try GitHub Copilot Back to changelog Improvement April 9, 2026 • 1 minute read New Sort by control added to Notifications A new “Sort by” control appears on the Notifications page, with two options: Newest to oldest (which matches the previous behavior) and Oldest to newest . The selected sort order applies across every view and it persists across sessions. When notifications are grouped by repository, sorting affects the order of groups themselves and the order of items within each group. This means you can work through your backlog methodically, without having to navigate to the last page and work backwards to find your oldest notifications. Drop your feedback in our Community discussion . collaboration tools Share Copied Shared Back to changelog Related Posts Apr.09 Improvement Repository member role labels now in pull request list view collaboration tools Apr.01 Improvement Codespaces is now generally available for GitHub Enterprise with data residency collaboration tools Mar.26 Release New pull requests dashboard is in public preview collaboration tools Mar.25 Improvement GitHub Copilot for Jira — Public preview enhancements collaboration tools copilot ... +1 Mar.25 Improvement Disable comments on individual commits collaboration tools Mar.19 Improvement Codespaces with data residency now available in Japan collaboration tools Mar.19 Improvement View code and comments side-by-side in pull request Files changed page collaboration tools Mar.17 Release GitHub Enterprise Server 3.20 is now generally available collaboration tools Mar.05 Release GitHub Copilot coding agent for Jira is now in public preview collaboration tools copilot ... +1 Subscribe to our developer newsletter Discover tips, technical guides, and best practices in our biweekly newsl

title: Release information in issue sidebar and default values for project fields - GitHub Changelog
excerpt: This update brings release tracking closer to your issues, configurable defaults for project fields, and faster navigation across related issues. Release information in the issue sidebar When an issue is…
body_excerpt: Release information in issue sidebar and default values for project fields - GitHub Changelog Skip to content Skip to sidebar / Blog Changelog Docs Customer stories Try GitHub Copilot See what's new Search Changelog Docs Customer stories See what's new Try GitHub Copilot Back to changelog Improvement April 9, 2026 • 1 minute read Release information in issue sidebar and default values for project fields This update brings release tracking closer to your issues, configurable defaults for project fields, and faster navigation across related issues. Release information in the issue sidebar When an issue is linked by a pull request, the “Development” section now shows the first release that shipped that pull request, directly beneath the pull request reference. Where available, linked pull request includes the release tag and one of the following badges: Latest : Available in a stable release. Pre-release : Included in a pre-release and not yet stable. Instantly see when a fix shipped, right from the issue page. Default values for project fields You can now set default values for text, number, and single select project fields. These values are automatically applied when new items are added to a project. Other improvements You can now open issue references in the issue viewer. Clicking an issue reference now opens the issue in the issue viewer so you can quickly view related issues without losing your place. This works from comments or timeline activity, including mentions, cross-references, sub-issues, and parent issues. Share your feedback in the GitHub Community . projects & issues Share Copied Shared Back to changelog Related Posts Apr.02 Improvement Improved search for GitHub Issues is now generally available projects & issues Mar.30 Release Create issues from Slack with Copilot copilot projects & issues ... +1 Mar.26 Release Agent activity in GitHub Issues and Projects projects & issues Mar.19 Improvement Hierarchy view in GitHub Projects is now generally available
